_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: Whereas there was no effect of Nf1 loss on the number of GFAP+ cells in the CTX, we observed nearly a 2-fold increase in the number of GFAP+ cells in the BS...we detected a 50% increase in NG2 staining in the Nf1GFAP CKO mouse optic nerves
details: Nearly 2-fold increase in GFAP+ cells in BS and significant increase in CB, with 50% increase in NG2 staining in optic nerves, but no effect in CTX
